harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: Middle-class families stroll past the mall interior
An elderly man leans on a cane
A woman in designer shoes clicks past

full_prompt:

composite_prompt: Background: The Sunnyvale Town Center Mall: a busy indoor shopping center with tile floors, populated by a diverse public demographic during the daytime., cane - walking aid for elderly or mobility-impaired shoppers
